calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming And Declaring That Certain Property Is Trust Asset And Derecting Transfer Of Title Of Same To Trustees Of Trust
Off Calendar Jan-09-2019 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Modification Of Trust
Off Calendar Dec-20-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Tara Morris appeared by telephone for Bank of America (Co-Trustee).
Amy Shelf for Michael Kerry (Co-Trustee).

Ms. Shelf stated that the Beneficiaries have not consented in any way of writing that she is aware of and that she is the drafting Attorney of the Trust. Counsel spoke of the Trustors relationship with Bank of America, the Banks guidelines and policies that govern their involvement in trusts, not having any information as to one of the potential Beneficiaries (Child of a remainder beneficiary) having a need for a special needs trust, stated that they did not seek consents from the remainder beneficiaries, etc. The Petition for Modification of Trust is under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Chan. Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming And Declaring That Certain Property Is Trust Asset And Derecting Transfer Of Title Of Same To Trustees Of Trust
Off Calendar Nov-28-2018 Continued To Jan-09-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
